category_sources: source_facts.description identifies nano as the GNU replacement for the Pico text editor; official nano docs identify GNU nano as a terminal text editor.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GNU nano site; official project pages use GNU nano branding.
docs_sources: Official GNU nano website provides a documentation page and current HTML manual.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official GNU nano source-code page says nano source is clonable from https://git.savannah.gnu.org/git/nano.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies nano as a text editor; source_facts.executables lists nano and rnano terminal commands.
